subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and Testament! At present, circumstances have arisen causing thee great trouble and preoccupation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی العهد و المیثاق علی العجاله اسباب زحمت و مشغولیت شدیده بجهت شما
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
